title: Add dark mode support with system preference detection
body:
Implements automatic dark mode that follows system preferences. Users can also manually toggle between light and dark themes via the settings panel.

## Changes
- Added CSS variables for theme colors
- Implemented system preference detection using prefers-color-scheme
- Added theme toggle component
- Persists user preference to localStorage
author: sarahdev

title: Fix memory leak in WebSocket connection handler
body:
Resolves the out-of-memory issues reported in #134. The WebSocket handler was not properly cleaning up event listeners when connections closed, leading to memory accumulation over time.

## Root Cause
Event listeners were being added on each reconnect but never removed.

## Fix
Implemented proper cleanup in the disconnect handler.
author: mikefixer

title: Upgrade to Node.js 20 LTS
body:
Bumps Node.js from 18.x to 20.x LTS.

## Benefits
- Improved performance
- Native fetch API
- Better ESM support
- Security updates
author: dependabot[bot]

title: Add rate limiting to authentication endpoints
body:
Implements rate limiting on login and registration endpoints to prevent brute force attacks.

## Configuration
- 5 attempts per minute for login
- 3 attempts per minute for registration
- Configurable via environment variables
author: securitypro

title: Optimize database queries for dashboard loading
body:
Reduces dashboard load time by 60% through query optimization.

## Changes
- Added compound indexes
- Implemented query batching
- Reduced N+1 queries in user list
author: perfguru

title: BREAKING: Rename `userId` to `user_id` in API responses
body:
Standardizes API response field names to use snake_case consistently.

## Migration
Update any client code that references `userId` to use `user_id` instead.

## Affected Endpoints
- GET /api/users
- GET /api/users/:id
- POST /api/users
author: apilead

title: Fix incorrect timezone handling in event scheduler
body: Events were being scheduled in UTC instead of the user's local timezone. This caused confusion for users in non-UTC timezones.
author: mikefixer

title: Add API documentation for webhook endpoints
body: Documents all webhook-related endpoints including payload formats, authentication, and retry behavior.
author: docwriter
